title: DroiiidPack 1.21.6
description: The best of Minecraft on the latest version.
body:
Frustrated by having to use outdated versions of Minecraft? Now you can follow along with the latest version! This modpack runs on the latest version of Minecraft, with updated mods and resource packs. You can use it as is, or add your own selection of mods.

The overarching theme of DroiiidPack is exploration. Starting in a village with an axe, a shield, and a good pair of shoes, venture out into the world to discover wonders above and below ground.

For the best experience, press Escape and select **Options > Resource Packs**, and install Belzephyr's Stylized Textures, Flow Font, Fast Better Grass, and any others that catch your eye. Here are a few highlights of the mods that are included - select **Options > Mods** to customize them.

Note: Some of the mods listed here are not yet available for the current version of Minecraft. I'll add them back when they are updated.

## Optimization
We start with the best optimization mods available, such as Sodium, Lithium, Concurrent Chunk Management, Entity Culling, and BadOptimizations. Speeds of over 1000fps are possible!

## Quality of Life
Making Minecraft more relaxing and less distracting, we add dozens of tweaks from mods like AppleSkin, Double Doors, Vanilla Refresh, Universal Graves, Easy Magic, and Essential Commands.

## Eye Candy
Shaders add vibrance and beauty to the world. I included a number of them for you to play with, including Solas Shader, BSL, and Complementary. In addition, resource packs like Belzephyr's Stylized Textures preserve the feel of Vanilla Minecraft but update it to the modern age. Several packs are included, so you can apply your own taste.

## Ear Candy
Sound can make the game much more immersive, so we add a number of improvements from mods like Presence Footsteps, Sound Physics Remastered, and Resonance. You may also notice that Villagers are less repetitive thanks to the Vocal Villagers resource pack.

## World Generation
We go all out with new and exciting biomes, terrain, and structures in all dimensions. The overworld is transformed by mods like Tectonic and ChoiceTheorem’s Overhauled Village, and the Nether is revamped by Amplified Nether. To wrap things up, Nullscape completely overhauls The End.

## Just for Fun
From resizable bees (Realistic Bees) to fun creepers (Ore Creeper), you'll find a number of surprises waiting for you.

## Add your Own Content
I tested hundreds of mods while putting together this modpack, and enabled the best ones that fit the theme. However, there are thousands of other mods and resource packs, so add your favorites and have fun!
